name: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio (DashScope)
description: Registers Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / DashScope as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with region-scoped Qwen chat and embedding models.

env.description: Fallback DashScope API key used for embeddings and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternative fallback Qwen/DashScope API key used when no api_key Plugin Setting or DASHSCOPE_API_KEY is configured.

settings.label: DashScope API key
settings.description: DashScope API key used for embeddings and inference. Falls back to DASHSCOPE_API_KEY, then QWEN_API_KEY.

settings.label: DashScope endpoint region
settings.description: Choose the fixed Alibaba Cloud Model Studio compatible-mode endpoint for this plugin configuration.

providers.name: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio
providers.description: Registers region-scoped Qwen chat models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.

providers.name: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Embeddings
providers.description: Provides text embeddings using DashScope's OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint for supported regions.
